summary: Frontend-only verification of HAREKET GEÇMİŞİ POS Satış row redesign in /app/frontend/app/kasa.tsx (lines 654-690). Ran mobile playwright test at 390x844 against public URL: created entry 'hayriye', added 3 POS sales (A: 3000/2000, B: 4000/3000, C: 5000/2500) and 1 non-POS sale (D: 1000/0). All 4 rows render with the new two-subline layout exactly as specified. All computed values match expected math. Transfer rendering code (lines 692-720) is untouched from the diff scope and there are no banks seeded to interactively create a transfer, so T5 verified via code inspection only.

verified_cases.T1_setup: PASS — 'hayriye' entry created; 3 POS sales + 1 non-POS sale added successfully.
verified_cases.T2_sale_row_format: PASS — Each POS-bearing sale row shows: title 'POS Satış' with POS badge; subline1 '08.07.2026 · Nakit <X> ₺'; subline2 'Pos <Y> ₺ · Kesinti <Z> ₺'; right amount '+<net> ₺' in green (asset color).
verified_cases.T4_no_pos_row: PASS — Sale D (1000/no POS) shows only 1 subline '08.07.2026 · Nakit 1.000,00 ₺'. Second Pos/Kesinti line correctly NOT rendered (tx.pos === 0). Right: '+1.000,00 ₺'. Note: 'POS Satış' title still shown (existing fallback behavior when tx.note is empty; out of scope for this change).
verified_cases.T5_transfer_row: NOT INTERACTIVELY TESTED — no banks are configured in the seed data (picker had 0 options), so no transfer could be created via UI. Code inspection of kasa.tsx lines 692-720 confirms transfer rendering is unchanged: single subline '<Tarih>[· <note>]' with AKTARIM badge and red '−<amount> ₺'. No regression risk from the diff which only touches the sale branch.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor (pre-existing, out of scope): a sale row with tx.tutar>0 and tx.pos===0 still shows 'POS Satış' as the title fallback when note is empty. Consider showing 'Nakit Satış' or hiding badge-related title when there is no POS. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 kasa entry 'hayriye' + 4 kasa transactions (3 POS + 1 non-POS) via UI at public URL for this test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The row layout is verified on web preview at 390x844. If banks are added to the store, T5 (transfer row) can be interactively verified by tapping 'Parayı Aktar (Bankaya)' inside a kasa entry action sheet.
